ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimension_length" TEXT /* Length of the product dimension */,
  "dimension_width" TEXT /* Width of the product dimension */,
  "dimension_height" TEXT /* Height of the product dimension */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the product is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method chosen by the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the customer */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product included in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of discount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping carrier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping carrier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping carrier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping carrier */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_shipments_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES shipping_carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product at the time of the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discount_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount code */,
  "code" TEXT /* The discount code itself */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of discount the code provides */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the code expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)
